overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an ancient Greek-themed video game. A character in Spartan-style armor walks along a wooden harbor dock at night, passing another guard and approaching the open sea where multiple ancient warships are anchored. The scene features deep blue nighttime lighting with fire braziers illuminating the stone harbor walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient harbor wooden pier with stone walls

events.description: player character passes the standing guard NPC on the dock

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock toward the open sea, passing a stationary guard

notable_agents.action: guard standing still on the dock facing the water, watching the harbor

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway with rope coils scattered about
large stone block wall forming the harbor structure with wooden scaffolding
burning fire pits mounted on the stone wall providing warm orange light
thick wooden posts with rope bindings lining the edge of the dock
ancient Greek triremes with sails anchored in the harbor waters

segments.scene_description: The player character walks along a narrow wooden dock at night, flanked by a stone harbor wall with burning braziers on the left and wooden posts on the right. The character approaches and passes a stationary guard standing in the middle of the dock, while ancient warships are visible in the dark water ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor pier end with panoramic sea view

events.description: stone harbor wall ends, view opens to open sea with ships in all directions
character stops at the end of the dock and turns to observe the ships

agents.ego_description: reaching the end of the dock and stopping to look out at the anchored warships in the harbor

entered.detail: dark blue open water of the harbor extending to the horizon under night sky

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the end of the dock where the stone wall gives way to an open panoramic view of the harbor. Multiple ancient warships with sails are anchored in the dark water in all directions. The character stops at the edge of the dock, turning to survey the maritime scene under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a narrow harbor dock that gradually opens into a wide panoramic view of a nighttime maritime fleet. It begins with the character walking past burning braziers along a stone harbor wall, moving forward as they pass a stationary guard stationed on the wooden planks. As the character reaches the end of the walkway, the confining stone walls give way to an expansive vista of the dark open sea. The scene then expands to reveal multiple ancient warships with sails anchored in all directions under the night sky before the camera comes to a halt at the dock's edge to survey the harbor.
